stat: Implied share of UK firms with 250 or more staff actually running agentic AI, mid-2025
applies_to: topic: agentic AI use cases for mid-market businesses
method: Recipe C / cross-source derivation — combining two published UK adoption figures the sources did not multiply together

sources_used.title: Business insights and impact on the UK economy (Business Insights and Conditions Survey), bulletin 8 January 2026
AI Adoption Research (survey February to May 2025)
sources_used.publisher: Department for Science, Innovation and Technology (IFF Research and Technopolis Group)

workings: ONS BICS (late December 2025): 44% of UK firms with 250+ employees use some form of AI. DSIT AI Adoption Research (survey 12 Feb - 2 May 2025): agentic AI is the least-adopted AI technology at 7% of AI-using firms. Combined: 0.44 x 0.07 = 0.0308 = approximately 3.1% of large/mid-market UK firms running agentic AI in mid-2025. Conservative note: the two surveys use slightly different populations and reference dates, so treat as an order-of-magnitude estimate; neither source published the combined figure.
